Sample message 
No parent wants to see their child miss out on learning or playtime because they are sick with flu. Getting your child vaccinated against flu each year is the best way to reduce your child's risk of getting flu and avoiding the worst flu symptoms if they do get sick. This can mean milder and shorter illness with fewer sick days. Ask your child's doctor about a flu vaccine and learn more at https://bit.ly/4pKHc79
